query: extreme harsh chiaroscuro single light source dramatic black abstract shadow
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: extreme chiaroscuro — single-source dramatic, abstract black/shadow play, deep contrast pushed to graphic abstraction

response.objective_caption: A figure wearing a textured brimmed hat sits against a completely black background. Narrow highlights illuminate the shoulders, one raised hand near the upper torso, and a patterned shirt cuff at the wrist.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A figure wearing a textured brimmed hat is rendered almost entirely in silhouette through extreme underexposure that crushes shadow detail across the face and body. Only narrow highlights catch the shoulders, one raised hand near the upper torso, and a patterned shirt cuff at the wrist, while the overwhelming darkness and obscured identity create an atmosphere of dread and unease.
